corpus.title: South Korea's top court upholds 7-year sentence for ex-president Yoon
corpus.signal_text:
South Korea's top court upholds 7-year sentence for ex-president Yoon

South Korea's Supreme Court on Thursday upheld a seven-year prison sentence handed down to former president Yoon Suk Yeol o charges of obstruction and other crimes tied to his botched 2024 martial law declaration. The disgraced former president has insisted his martial law declaration was motivated by the public interest.

corpus.title: Corée du Sud : la Cour suprême confirme la condamnation de l'ex-président Yoon à sept ans de prison
corpus.signal_text:
Corée du Sud : la Cour suprême confirme la condamnation de l'ex-président Yoon à sept ans de prison

La Cour suprême sud-coréenne a confirmé jeudi la condamnation à sept ans de prison de l'ancien président Yoon Suk-yeol pour des faits liés à sa déclaration ratée de la loi martiale en 2024 et aux conséquences chaotiques qui en ont découlé. L'ex-chef de l'État avait notamment entravé les délibérations du Conseil des ministres et utilisé des signatures falsifiées du Premier ministre.

corpus.title: South Korea’s Supreme Court upholds prison sentence for Yoon in first martial law case
corpus.signal_text:
South Korea’s Supreme Court upholds prison sentence for Yoon in first martial law case

A TV screen shows an image of former South Korea President Yoon Suk Yeol during a news program at the Seoul Railway Station in Seoul, South Korea, Thursday, July 9, 2026. corpus.title: El Supremo de Corea del Sur ratifica la condena de 7 años contra el expresidente Yoon
corpus.signal_text:
El Supremo de Corea del Sur ratifica la condena de 7 años contra el expresidente Yoon

El Tribunal Supremo de Corea del Sur ratificó este jueves la condena de siete años de prisión impuesta al expresidente Yoon Suk Yeol por cargos de obstrucción y otros delitos vinculados a su fallida declaración de ley marcial en 2024. El desacreditado exmandatario ha insistido en que su declaración de ley marcial estuvo motivada por el interés público.

corpus.title: Supreme Court to Rule on 2025 Standoff between Law Enforcement, Ex-President Yoon
corpus.signal_text:
Supreme Court to Rule on 2025 Standoff between Law Enforcement, Ex-President Yoon

[Politics] : The Supreme Court is set to deliver its first ruling in a slew of cases centering on former President Yoon Suk Yeol and his martial law bid on December 3, 2024. The bench will begin its proceedings at 2 p.m. Thursday, 583 days after Yoon issued his short-lived martial law decree, to pass the final judgment ...[more...]

corpus.title: Supreme Court Upholds 7-Year Sentence for Ex-President Yoon for Obstruction of Justice
corpus.signal_text:
Supreme Court Upholds 7-Year Sentence for Ex-President Yoon for Obstruction of Justice

[Politics] : The Supreme Court has upheld a seven-year prison term for former President Yoon Suk Yeol for obstructing justice by blocking investigators from arresting him in the wake of his failed martial law bid in 2024. This is the top court’s first ruling in any of the cases facing Yoon, 583 days after his ...[more...]

corpus.title: South Korea ex-minister gets 25 years for role in martial law disaster: Yonhap
corpus.signal_text:
South Korea ex-minister gets 25 years for role in martial law disaster: Yonhap

A court sentenced a former South Korean justice minister on Monday to 25 years in prison for his role in ex-president Yoon Suk Yeol's brief and disastrous declaration of martial law in 2024.

corpus.title: S.Korean court extends detention of ex-president Park over corruption charges
corpus.signal_text:
S.Korean court extends detention of ex-president Park over corruption charges

A South Korean court on Friday decided to extend the detention of impeached President Park Geun-hye who has been in custody and stood trial over corruption charges including bribery.

corpus.title: S.Korean court ends longest-ever hearing on warrant to arrest ex-president Park
corpus.signal_text:
S.Korean court ends longest-ever hearing on warrant to arrest ex-president Park

A South Korean court on Thursday ended the longest-ever hearing here on a warrant to arrest former President Park Geun-hye, who was impeached earlier this month.
